{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Silver Heart madra
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Silver Heart madra]] can put [[Yerin]] to sleep.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
